edus.text: President Trump vowed on Monday to make space great again .
Speak
ng at a meeting of the National Space Council ,
rump ordered the Pentagon to immediately establish a national " space force "
hat would become the sixth branch of the armed forces .
We are going to have a space force , "
rump said in Washington D.C.
An Air Force and a Space Force .
eparate , but equal . "
his is not the first time
hat Trump has floated the idea
f establishing a " space force. "
he president mentioned the idea in May during a ceremony at the White House
onoring the Army Black Knights college football team .
rump did not go into details
bout what military role the so-called " space force " would carry out or who would command it ,
ut he framed space as a national security issue ,
aying
e does not want `` China and Russia and other countries leading us . ''
entagon spokeswoman Dana White responded :
We understand the President 's guidance .
ur Policy Board will begin working on this issue ,
hich has implications for intelligence operations for the Air Force , Army , Marines and Navy .
orking with Congress ,
his will be a deliberate process with a great deal of input from multiple stakeholders . "
he president said
he United States will " be the leader by far " in space
nd is looking to revive the nation 's flagging space program
y returning the United States to the moon
nd soon reaching Mars .
rump was joined by Vice President Pence ,
ho heads the National Space Council ,
s well as NASA Administrator Jim Bridenstine , former astronaut Buzz Aldrin and other members of the council .
long with the call for the " space force , " Trump also called for a build-up in the long term presence in space ,
hrew his support behind the nascent commercial space travel industry
nd signed a directive
o manage space traffic .
he directive calls for providing a safe and secure environment up in orbit ,
s satellite traffic increases .
t also sets up new guidelines for satellite design and operation ,
o avoid collisions and spacecraft breakups .
he council 's executive secretary , Scott Pace , told reporters before the meeting
hat space is becoming increasingly congested
nd current guidelines are inadequate
o address the challenge .
efore making his remarks on the space program ,
resident Trump also weighed in on the ongoing immigration crisis
blasting the U.S. ' current immigration laws
nd saying
he crisis is " the Democrats ' fault . "
The United States will not be a migrant holding facility , "
rump said .
We ca n't allow that to happen in the U.S.
ot on my watch .
e want safety
nd we want security .
rump added :
If the Democrats would sit down
nd stop obstructing ,
e could have something quickly . ''
he Trump administration ' s policy
f separating migrant children from their parents
as come under increasing scrutiny from both sides if the aisle .
he policy ,
hich has resulted in nearly 2,000 minors
eing separated from their families over six weeks ,
as drawn sharp criticism from Democrats and even a number of influential Republicans ,
ncluding former first lady Laura Bush ,
ho called the policy " cruel " and " immoral " in an opinion piece in the Washington Post .
